allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in [''''dependencies'''',''''devDependencies''''] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az cosmosdb sql container create --resource-group rg-underwriter-workbench --account-name cosmos-uw-workbench-dev --database-name underwriter-workbench --name submissions --partition-key-path /submissionId --throughput 400)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az cosmosdb sql container create --resource-group rg-underwriter-workbench --account-name cosmos-uw-workbench-dev --database-name underwriter-workbench --name devtools --partition-key-path /ownerId --throughput 400)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az cosmosdb sql container create --resource-group rg-underwriter-workbench --account-name cosmos-uw-workbench-dev --database-name underwriter-workbench --name portfolio --partition-key-path /id --throughput 400)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az cosmosdb keys list --resource-group rg-underwriter-workbench --account-name cosmos-uw-workbench-dev --type connection-strings --query "connectionStrings[0].connectionString" --output tsv)
